sentences.arabic: غَسْلُ الْيَدَيْنِ بِالْمَاءِ وَالصَّابُونِ يَحْمِي مِنَ الْأَمْرَاضِ.
sentences.translation: Pranje ruku sapunom i vodom štiti od bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: Washing hands with soap and water protects against diseases.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ تَنْظِيفُ الْأَسْنَانِ مَرَّتَيْنِ فِي الْيَوْمِ عَلَى الْأَقَلِّ.
sentences.translation: Zube treba prati najmanje dva puta dnevno.
sentences.translationEn: Teeth must be cleaned at least twice a day.

sentences.arabic: النَّظَافَةُ الشَّخْصِيَّةُ هِيَ الْخُطْوَةُ الْأُولَى لِلْوِقَايَةِ الصِّحِّيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Lična higijena je prvi korak u zdravstvenoj prevenciji.
sentences.translationEn: Personal hygiene is the first step for health prevention.
